error.action_required: data.action field is required (e.g., prices, candles).
error.api_key_missing: TOSS_CLIENT_ID / TOSS_CLIENT_SECRET not set. Register under Settings > System Modules > toss-invest.
error.token_missing: Toss access token not issued — infra token issuance failed or invalid client_id/secret.
error.unknown_action: Unknown action: {{action}}. See the Toss Securities Open API docs.
error.account_required: {{action}}: accountSeq required (call accounts first for X-Tossinvest-Account).
